name: Maelis Deepcurrent

race.name: Triton
race.description: Originally from the Elemental Plane of Water, many tritons entered the Material Plane centuries ago to protect it from the growing threat of evil elementals. They spread across the worlds’ oceans, establishing deep-sea settlements to guard the surface from terrors in the deep. With their webbed hands and feet and small fins on their calves, they are perfectly adapted for aquatic life.
traits: Amphibious: You can breathe air and water.

Control Air and Water: You can cast Fog Cloud with this trait. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast Gust of Wind with it, and starting at 5th level, you can also cast Water Walk with it. Once you cast any of these spells with this trait, you can’t cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells when you cast them with this trait (choose when you select this race).

Vision: You can see in [[dim_light|dim light]] within 60 feet of you as if it were [[bright_light|bright light]], and in [[darkness]] as if it were [[dim_light|dim light]]. You can't discern color in [[darkness]], only shades of gray.

Emissary of the Sea: You can communicate simple ideas to any Beast, Elemental, or Monstrosity that has a swimming speed. It can understand your words, though you have no special ability to understand it in return.
Guardian of the Depths: Adapted to the frigid ocean depths, you have resistance to cold damage.

racialSpellChoice.traitDescription: Choose your spellcasting ability for these spells: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma.

class.name: Barbarian
class.description: A fierce warrior who can enter a battle rage.

features.name: Rage
features.description: Enter a rage as a bonus action.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier.

class.statRecommendationDetails: Strength fuels your rage and attacks. Constitution makes you tougher and boosts your AC without armor.

MainHand.name: Greataxe
MainHand.description: A heavy two-handed axe for brutal melee strikes.

visualDescription: A high fantasy character portrait of a level 1 Triton Barbarian. Male adventurer. Head-and-shoulders, detailed, dramatic lighting, neutral background.
